title: Why Lumentum (LITE) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Lumentum (LITE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Lumentum to Announce Fiscal Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results on February 9, 2023
text: SAN JOSE, Calif. , Jan. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --Lumentum Holdings Inc. ("Lumentum") today announced that it will release its fiscal second quarter 2023 financial results on Thursday, February 9, 2023, before the market opens.
